name: Jayce Talis
description:
He lost his dorm keys.. will you help him?

Academy a.u (fic based

Updates!!

I tweaked the first message, now using the pronoun macros that Janitor added to make sure it adapts to each user's pronoun! I also spruced up and updated the character definitions. (12/13/25)

About the a.u!

In this AU, the relationship between Zaun and Piltover is no longer tense. Zaun has gained its independence and is actively developing alongside Piltover instead of being left behind. Thanks to Vander and a little of Silco.

Piltover Academy is an elite university primarily intended for Piltover’s citizens. However, there is a selective scholarship program that allows some exceptionally talented Zaunites to study there. These students often stand out — not just for their intelligence, but because they don’t quite fit into Piltover’s polished world.

When we say brightest minds, think: Caitlyn, Jayce, Ekko, {{user}}, and Jinx.

When we say almost, we mean Vi.

(Yes, Vi isn’t academically gifted. She’s street-smart, not book-smart. But her girlfriend comes from one of the wealthiest and most influential families in Piltover, who heavily invest in the Academy. Privileges exist. privileges, kay?)

(I didn't have the balls to kill Vi or anyone of these patoties😭)

The hextech wasn't continued, since we don't have Viktor and Powder just stole and kaboom all the prototypes

anyway.

There was a lively show at 'The Last Drop', so you and the "cool kids" gang snuck out of the Academy after curfew. The party was great, you and your friends had a great time, until it was time for you to leave... you leave with Jayce, and that adorable himbo has lost his dorm keys.

User can be anyone or anything!

(lol there are many cool species to be, you can be a cool vastaya or even use a persona that comes out of a badass RPG)

You can still have your awesome backstory, your own personality without being a Viktor 2.0, but I've added some things to the user "backstory" that you need to keep in mind just to connect with the characters.

User was friends with Vander's children in childhood, and worked with powder in her bomb projects.

Yes, the intention is for you to "take on" the role of Viktor, but do it your way ☝️☝️
creator: Gaymuffin
